scripts.hook: I built a privacy-first subscription tracker 🛡️
scripts.script: No bank linking. No data selling. No subscriptions to track your subscriptions. Just a simple, beautiful app that helps you save money. Link in bio.

scripts.hook: I found $847 in subscriptions I forgot about 💸
scripts.script: Netflix, Spotify, Adobe, that gym I never go to, some app from 2021... it all adds up. Check your subscriptions before it's too late. App in bio.

scripts.hook: Your finance app knows too much about you 🕵️
scripts.script: Every purchase. Every paycheck. Every account balance. And they're selling it. My app keeps your data on YOUR device. Period.
